# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-06-25 | **更新时间**: 07:38 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[04:29]` **🏛️监管 | 美国 FDA 批准 Trodelvy® 用于转移性三阴性乳腺癌的一线治疗**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *U.S. FDA Approves Trodelvy® for First-Line Treatment of Metastatic Triple-Negative Breast Cancer* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:30]` **REPROCELL 提交用于治疗脊髓小脑性共济失调（SCA3 和 SCA6）的干细胞疗法 Stemchymal® 在日本的制造和营销批准申请**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *REPROCELL Submits Application for Manufacturing and Marketing Approval in Japan for Stem Cell Therapy Stemchymal® for Spinocerebellar Ataxia (SCA3 and SCA6)* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[16:52]` **🏛️监管 | 全球首个实体瘤CAR-T获批：嘉会国际肿瘤中心为全球患者提供服务**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *World's First Solid Tumor CAR-T Approved: Jiahui International Cancer Center Provides Access for Patients Worldwide* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)</small>
- `[14:04]` **🏛️监管 | UniXell生物技术UX-DA003获得FDA IND批准，实现中美合作iPSC 帕金森疗法的双重突破**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *UniXell Biotechnology Secures FDA IND Clearance for UX-DA003, Achieving China-U.S. Dual Breakthrough in iPSC Parkinson's Therapy* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
